title: phlegmariurus gracilis
intro: Phlegmariurus gracilis, also known as the slender forked polypody, is a type of evergreen fern native to tropical Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus gracilis include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in wound healing and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
